metadata.statute: Utah Code §15-1-1(2) (10% general); §78B-5-824 (PI special damages, prime+2%)

annual_rate.notes: Utah general/contract prejudgment interest is 10% fixed (Utah Code §15-1-1(2)). For personal-injury actions (causes arising on/after July 1, 2014), prejudgment interest on SPECIAL damages is instead prime + 2% (5% floor, 10% cap) — currently 8.75%, simple — under §78B-5-824. Current PI value as of July 2026; verify at le.utah.gov. Not legal advice.
